issue_title: ECharts display issues: Incomplete container width and rendering failure for multiple charts
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 在对话或报表页面中，触发生成多个 ECharts 图表，观察每个图表的容器宽度是否完整填充父容器，以及多个图表是否都能正常渲染显示。
expected_result_zh: 所有 ECharts 图表的容器宽度应完整填充其父容器，不出现宽度不足或截断的情况；多个图表均应正常渲染，不出现空白、渲染失败或图表缺失的问题。
